overall.description: A first-person exploration of a cyberpunk-style repurposed church interior from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player moves from a back office through a glass partition into a vast concrete nave dominated by a massive pink neon cross, approaches a candle-lit altar, and explores a side storage area.

events.description: moving from back office through doorway into main church chamber

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit back room toward the glass partition separating the office from the main church

entered.detail: tall vending machine with 'COLA' branding illuminated in red and purple neon
large glass window looking into the main church chamber with green tint
retro-style CRT computer monitor sitting on a metal desk
green-tinted fluorescent tube lights mounted on the concrete ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow back office with green fluorescent lighting. A vending machine stands to the left while a computer terminal sits on a desk. The camera moves forward toward a large glass window looking into a larger chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: main church nave with towering neon cross

events.description: entering the vast main church chamber with high concrete ceilings and dramatic lighting
passing by a standing NPC and continuing toward the altar

agents.ego_description: walking through the church nave toward the altar platform, passing a bystander near the entrance

notable_agents.action: standing still near the entrance wearing an orange jacket and dark pants
small white dog standing near the orange construction barrier

entered.detail: massive pink neon cross mounted high on the far concrete wall, glowing brightly
massive brutalist concrete pillar supporting the vaulted ceiling
raised concrete platform with wide steps leading up to the altar area
thick black industrial cables hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a vast concrete church interior dominated by a massive pink neon cross on the far wall. The space features brutalist architecture with hanging cables and a raised altar platform. An NPC in an orange jacket stands near the entrance, and a small white dog is visible near a construction barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: altar area with candle shrine and religious icon

events.description: approaching the altar where dramatic spotlighting illuminates the candle arrangement

agents.ego_description: approaching the altar platform and focusing on the candle shrine and religious icon

entered.detail: dozens of lit candles of various sizes arranged on the floor around the altar base
framed religious painting of a robed figure mounted on the front of the altar
wide concrete stairs leading up to the raised altar platform

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the altar platform, revealing a shrine of numerous lit candles at its base and a religious icon mounted on the front. The neon cross remains visible in the background. The concrete steps and altar details become prominent as the camera moves closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: side storage area with metal shelving

events.description: moving from the altar area to the left side storage room with industrial shelving
encountering a second NPC standing near the metal shelving unit

agents.ego_description: turning left and exploring the side storage area behind the altar, passing metal shelves

notable_agents.action: standing near metal shelves wearing a blue jacket and light-colored pants

entered.detail: tall black metal shelving unit stocked with boxes and various supplies
cardboard boxes and plastic storage containers stacked on the floor
long vertical neon light fixture with green and pink glow mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the altar into a side storage area featuring metal shelving units and storage crates. A vertical neon fixture illuminates the space with green and pink light. An NPC in a blue jacket stands near the shelves. The neon cross and altar are now visible in the background to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, fluorescent-lit office into a vast, brutalist church interior illuminated by neon light. It begins in a narrow back office beside a vending machine and computer terminal, moving forward through a glass partition that opens into a massive concrete nave. As the camera enters the main chamber, the space expands to reveal hanging cables and a towering pink neon cross on the far wall, passing an NPC in an orange jacket and a small white dog. The movement continues toward the altar platform, where the focus shifts to a shrine of numerous lit candles and a religious icon before turning away from the neon cross. Finally, the camera glides into a side storage area filled with metal shelving and crates, where the lighting transitions to a mix of green and pink neon as it approaches an NPC in a blue jacket.
